recommendations.title: Here Comes the Devil
recommendations.overview: A married couple loses their children while on a family trip near some caves in Tijuana. The kids eventually reappear without explanation, but it becomes clear that they are not who they used to be, that something terrifying has changed them.

recommendations.title: Come Play With Me
recommendations.overview: Sofia, an insecure young woman, begins babysitting two troublesome siblings that turn her job into a complete living hell. That is until a devilish presence starts messing with the trio and they must band together to fight the demon away.

recommendations.title: The Exorcist
recommendations.overview: Ophelia, a young nun recently arriving in the town of San Ramon, is forced to perform an exorcism on a pregnant woman in danger of dying. Just when she thinks her possession has ended, she discovers that the evil presence hasn't disappeared yet. The

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: Infested
recommendations.overview: Residents of a rundown French apartment building battle against an army of deadly, rapidly reproducing spiders.

recommendations.title: See for Me
recommendations.overview: When blind former Olympic skier Sophie Scott cat-sits in a secluded mansion, she gets caught in the crossfire of a home invasion scheme. She must rely on a sighted Army veteran via the See for Me app to help her survive the night.

recommendations.title: Don't Move
recommendations.overview: A grieving woman in a secluded forest encounters a killer who injects her with a paralytic drug. As her body shuts down, her fight for survival begins.

recommendations.title: Don't Breathe 2
recommendations.overview: The Blind Man has been hiding out for several years in an isolated cabin and has taken in and raised a young girl orphaned from a devastating house fire. Their quiet life together is shattered when a group of criminals kidnap the girl, forcing the Bl

recommendations.title: The Rule of Jenny Pen
recommendations.overview: Confined to a secluded rest home and trapped within his stroke-ridden body, a former Judge must stop an elderly psychopath who employs a child's puppet to abuse the home's residents with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: When Evil Lurks
recommendations.overview: When brothers Pedro and Jimi discover that a demonic infection has been festering in a nearby farmhouse, they attempt to evict the victim from their land. Failing to adhere to the proper rites of exorcism, their reckless actions inadvertently trigger
